/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -DNIMCP_TESTING -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libnimcp_core.so.2 -o libnimcp_core.so.2.5.0 CMakeFiles/nimcp_core.dir/__/api/nimcp.c.o
